title: Martial Cultivation Biography Episode 10 Subbed
description: The ordinary boy Han Li was born in poverty. In order for his family to live better, he voluntarily went to Qixuanmen to participate in the entrance exams, and was finally accepted by Doctor Mo. At first, doctor Mo carefully developed and taught Han Li his medical expertise, which made Han Li very grateful to him, but when his disciple Zhang Tie disappeared, Han Li found the original face of Doctor Mo. Doctor Mo tried to seize Han , but was eventually murdered by Han Li. Through the suicide notes of Doctor Mo, Han Li learned about a completely new world: the existence of the world of immortality. After helping Qixuanmen to fight the alien enemy, Han Li leaves Qixuanmen and goes to Dr. Mo's house to find Nuanyang Baoyu to detoxify and help the Mo family defeat the enemy. Knowing Tainan Xiaohui's address through the mouths of Dr. Mo's daughter, Mo Caihuan, Han Li decided to go to Tainan Xiaohui to follow the tracks of the cultivators. After saying goodbye to his family
